entry.title: Re: How to delete null entries/values during calculation...
entry.content: MoonJun, Does DELETE() not delete the record itself? So when a record is being deleted, it should delete all all measures for that record?

entry.title: Re: First Half 2025 Release: What is New for SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals?
entry.content:
Hello @MayaraTabone 

I'm testing the latest performance experience in preview instance.

There are a few issues during the test.

1. Participants can input section comments but Section comments are not saved and participants can not see any comments by any participants include themselves after input. It is described as a known issue in below KBA, but the behavior seems a little different from what I have checked. Also it was planed to be fixed on 29th April, but till today 9th May the issue still consists, this is a very critical issue that will determine whether we can enable the latest experience in production instance, when will this be fixed?
3596704 - Missing section comment in signature/completed step when latest experience of Performance Management forms is enabled - 1H2025 - SAP for Me

2. It is the admins who need RTE not the end users. Is it possible to improve the experience of RTE on manage templates and forms (I find there are some improvement for example the way to insert an image but we need more)? For example the window of section description is fixed size, it's impossible for an admin to edit the section description easily, and also many html tags and attributes are disabled so even you edit the html source from provisioning and check the preview result from there you will only get a different result that you never expected. For our client (an international manufacturer) it is a disaster to enable RTE for end users. Because most of them don't know how to use RTE and the html tags will appear in all type of reports except the print view of form even if no one is using RTE purposely. This will cost admins great effort to deal with.

entry.title: Re: Configuration SupportBackbone
entry.content:
Hello David,

We have the Baltimore CyberTrust Root CA certificate in our system in STRUST, which was set up as part of the SAP Support Backbone configuration. As we know, the certificate will expire on May 12th. How does this affect the functionality of SAP Support Backbone and what measures need to be taken to avoid the impact?

-Sri

entry.title: Re: Access Control - Assessment of users, roles and their...
entry.content:
Hi olgavlachova,

I appreciate your prompt detailed response. It really helps me to cope up getting familiarized and in-depth with security concept.
 
- Are mentioned businesses separated by organizational values (Company Code, etc.)? 
  
   This is the one I need to figure out first. But don't know how to. Can you guide me on this?
 
- Does exist SAP Authorization Concept describing SAP roles, their content and who is responsible for?
 
I believe there's one Administrator who handles the Security roles, etc.
 
- Which version of SAP GRC AC are you running?
 
Since I'm new to the project, I don't think their system has GRC. (ECC system)
 
- Do you have implemented BRM including Access Control Owners and are Role Owners defined?
 
      I'm not familiar with BRM, sorry.
 
- And do you have implemented Access Risk Analysis and adjusted SoD matrix?
 
Is it something feasible with ECC system? How does it work?

Thank you.

entry.title: Can't use created Integration Suite capabilities
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have created 2 capabilities on the SAP Integration Suite, on the BTP. I have assigned all the necessary roles for the Integration Suite and the capabilities created within it, but for some reason I cannot use those capabilities, when I click on them nothing happens almost as if I have not been assigned the necessary role

Also I cannot see any of the items on the side bar that should come with the capabilities created.


Can anyone help me in resolving this.

We have the Baltimore CyberTrust Root CA certificate in our system in STRUST, which was set up as part of the SAP Support Backbone configuration. As we know, the certificate will expire on May 12th 2025 and there is no renewal for it. How does this affect the functionality of SAP Support Backbone and what measures need to be taken to avoid the impact?

-Sri

entry.title: Disable row select in Fiori element List report app with Grid Table and Odata V4 based on condition.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement where I need disable the row select based on backed conditions in Grid table Fiori element List report.

I am able to achieve it with Responsive table where the row is greyed out but its making the navigation to object page disable as well and due to which other column values are unknown.

I need to change the table to Grid table but in V4, I am not getting table object instance in OnAfterRendering event so that I use UI table events.

Kindly please help as this requirement is critical for business and I am struggling because of it.

Help and suggestions are much appreciated.

Thanks,

Best Regards,

Raina

entry.title: SAP Signavio Best practices and overlays
entry.content: In SAP Signavio, do the pre-modeled processes from the Value Accelerator Library automatically include business roles (such as buyer, controller, quality manager) associated with individual tasks as overlays, or does the user need to add them manually?

entry.title: Icons and Criticality in Analytical Table - OdataV2
entry.content:
Hello Community,

First of all, it must be mentioned that this post refers to oData V2. Unfortunately, V4 still does not support analytical tables..

What is the best way to implement an icon as a column in the analytical table? And without also showing a second column with the icon URI.

In my case, I have a larger “CASE-WHEN” condition in a CDS view that returns several URIs for SAP icons in a column. Since “@Semantics.imageUrl: true” only works in Odata V4 and unfortunately not in V2, I have added a column via extension with the Icons.

However, this only works as long as I also show the second column with the URI. If I hide this column with @ui.hidden: true”, the icons disappear. Which makes sense from my point of view. But even if I include this column in the oData and only hide it in the frontend, the icons disappear.

The problem has also existed with Criticality for over 5 years. Here too, the column with the criticality status must always be visible in the analytical table, otherwise the colors disappear again. But in the responsive Table it works. 

Is there a sensible workaround to continue to work around the problem or is there already a solution from SAP?


regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Ag...
entry.content:
Hi @guenay 

Please refer to the below Advanced Formulas script to get your expectation. 

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Amount"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "202501"

VARIABLEMEMBER #PLG1_total OF [d/Material]

FOREACH [d/Material].[p/PLG1]
	DATA([d/Account] = "COMA032_%", [d/Material] = #PLG1_total)
	= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "COMA032_%")
	
	IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "COMA032_%") != Null THEN
		DATA([d/Account] = "COMA032_%_Material")
		= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "COMA032_%", [d/Material] = #PLG1_total)
	ENDIF
ENDFOR

This is an AF script logic that temporarily stores subtotals by property in the variable member #PLG1_total, and then records those subtotals into the account "COMA032_%_Material" and the corresponding Material member.

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HA...
entry.content:
Thank you,

I tried running the command:

cds deploy --auto-undeploy

and in the prompt, I saw the following message:

successfully deployed to db.sqlite

After performing the deploy, the tables were cleared as expected.

Here is my deployment procedure for all environments:

cf login --sso

mbt build -t gen --mtar mta.mtar (this generates a folder within the project containing the mtar file, which is the one I deploy)

cf deploy gen/mta.mtar

I opened the generated mtar file, but I do not see any .csv files inside it. However, the database still gets cleared during the deployment. Could you help me understand why this is happening?

Thank you again for your support!

entry.title: Re: Performance Evaluation Form Routing Exception
entry.content:
Hello 

Hope you're doing well!

As per the current system functionality, it is not possible to configure a business rule to skip a specific route map step. However, a viable workaround is to set up the 'Manager Assessment' step as an iterative step. In this configuration, the manager can be defined as the entry user and the second-level manager as the exit user.

This setup will provide the first-level manager with two options:

  • 'Send to Next Step'
  • 'Send to Second-Level Manager'

For employees who require a second-level review, the manager can route the form accordingly. Otherwise, they can directly move it to the next step in the process.

Thanks,

Amaan

.

entry.title: Re: Entry and Flow of S/4 HANA CATS Time Records
entry.content:
Hi Renee,

First of all, thank you for your detailed explanation about CATS. I was able to successfully enter an employee's time in the timesheet, however, I’m currently facing an issue when trying to transfer the data to PS via CAT5.

When I check CATSDB, the status of the WBS element is 30, which should allow the transfer. However, when I use CATA to transfer the data to both CO and PS, only the CO records appear. For PS, the system displays a message saying that there are no records to transfer.

Could you please advise on what might be causing this constraint?

entry.title: Re: Can't use created Integration Suite capabilities
entry.content: clear the cache or try to log in using incognito browser if you have already given the roles.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Lot Sizing Method "Target Stock Level" in SAP BusinessByDesign
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the extraordinary explanation. It was really very practical and very well exposed.

I have tested and it works as you indicate with only one excepction.

You say:

In other words, the quantity of proposal shall be the maximum of the following.

  • 1. quantity difference between the target stock level to the stock level at that moment. Which is 140 EA (Target stock level 150 EA – Stock level 10 EA).

    2. quantity to make the projected stock as 0. Which is 90 EA

     

    In my tests, the proposals are not for the maximum or both but it generates the proposal applying the second option: quantity to make the projected stock as 0.

    What could it be the resason for this behaviour in the system?

     

    Thanks in advance,

entry.title: SRM Limit orders with single line - Multiple VAT Invoice
entry.content:
Hello experts,

A limit Purchase Order (PO) has been created with only one line item, but the invoice received includes multiple tax codes. When the cogent team scans and sends the invoice, only one tax code appears in the cockpit.

Solution: How can we handle this situation in SAP SRM 7.0?

#SAP #SAPSRM

entry.title: HanaDB Instance in Free tier deleted, now I cannot delete the service
entry.content:
Hello,

created a free tier HanaDB in BTP. Used it for months but it was left untouched for some time and the db was eventually deleted (after 30 days).

Bit of a nuisance, but no big deal as the data can easily be re-created. But now the related BTP services cannot be deleted:

Any ideas?

Unfortunately the applications bound to this service cannot be deleted either due to the same error.

New schema services try to bind to the deleted hanadb, so again, no joy.

I will try creating a new free hanadb in a different space, but is there any other way to entirely remove the original one?

entry.title: Re: Conflict Using Fixed Bin & General Storage Strategies...
entry.content:
Hi @Shubham120798 ,

the idea of "General Storage Area" is to have a storage type, where all products are just collected in one bin and there is no real putaway logic. An example would be the CL-AREA.

If you want to use the fixed bin strategy, I'd propose you create another storage type for these bins.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Guidance on Monthly Financial Data Upload to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Finance and Technical Experts,

I would greatly appreciate your suggestions and insights regarding the monthly upload of financial data into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2SL) from Oracle NetSuite, which is used by another company within the same corporate group.

We are looking for best practices not only from a technical implementation perspective but also in terms of financial accuracy and audit compliance.

Background and Constraints:

  • NetSuite is an audit-compliant ERP system and already performs tax calculations.
  • The extracted journal entry item-level data includes tax information, so recalculating taxes in SAP must be avoided.
  • The source data contains over 40,000 journal entry lines per month, and uploading the full dataset can take 3–5 hours, which is not acceptable due to performance constraints.

Our current approach:

  • Instead of uploading item-level journal entries, we are planning to upload summary-level data by G/L account.

Request:

  • Do you see any concerns or potential risks with this summary-data upload approach?
  • Are there any technical or financial integrity issues we should be aware of?
  • What best practices would you recommend to ensure accurate and efficient integration?

Your experience and guidance would be very helpful. Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Takashi

Satish Kumar

entry.title: Re: CAP Hybrid testing using PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyper...
entry.content:
After some struggles myself I managed to make it work from VSCode.

It turns out that PostgreSQL on BTP rejects non-SSL connections by default (see https://help.sap.com/docs/postgresql-on-sap-btp/postgresql-on-sap-btp-hyperscaler-option/using-secure-socket-layer-ssl-encryption-for-postgresql-db-instances). So you need to copy over the ssl cert from the service key as well.

Additionally, you need to increase the default timeout so your SSH tunnel has time to process the connection request.

This works for me, after opening the SSH tunnel on port 12345:

"cds": {
  "requires": {
    "[pg-hybrid]": {
      "db": {
        "kind": "postgres",
        "credentials": {
          "hostname": "127.0.0.1",
          "port": "12345",
          "username": "...",
          "password": "...",
          "dbname": "...",
          "sslcert": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----",
          "sslrootcert": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----"
        },
        "pool": {
          "acquireTimeoutMillis": 2000
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

The reason is because they point an Instance called lcl_connnection with the Operator NEW, and they are calling a method defined in the loca types. So thal tyoes

entry.title: How to get a negative value in selection criteria of query report?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to get a negative value in the selection criteria of a query report?

Please see the sample below:

DECLARE @dayfrom AS INT
DECLARE @dayto AS INT
Select @dayfrom = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%0]' Select @dayfrom = '[%0]'
Select @dayto = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%1]' Select @dayto = '[%1]'

While executing this, we can add a negative sign and the report would should data as per selection criteria.

Ex. -10 & -20

Is it possible to make changes in the report so that the user enters a positive value but the query checks it for negative value, ex: in selection criteria user enters 10 and 20 but the result should display it based on  -10 and -20?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Re: How to improve Date Dimension labels in a line chart...

entry.title: Re: Introduction for tcode MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT
entry.content:
Hi everybody, 

when I'm on a SAP ERP 6.0 SP 36 (04/2024) System. 

When i start Logon with language DE and run MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT no texts for data sets are displayed, and Customer → BP can not be synced no error Message in PPO or anywhere else. 

When i start Logon with language EN and run MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT texts for data sets are displayed, and Customer → BP can be synced without a problem. 

Left DE right EN:

Further Problem on a Customer System is, if you've got texts stored in DE on Customer Data but run MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT in EN, system is telling you "Text not available in logon language. no records synchronized" so workaround by using  MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT in EN is not possible. 

Can't fine a note, also can't even find up-to-date information about "Datenmengen für Synchrionisation auswählen" or "Select Data Sets for Synconization" for that matter.

This option is only mentioned in relation to MDS_COMPARE_TOOL (see https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/compare-tool-for-master-data-synchronization-related-to-cvi/ba-p/13553386)

Anyone any idea ?

entry.title: Re: WalkMe Now Available in SAP SuccessFactors : A New Era of Digital Adoption
entry.content: @ibrahimelajjo You can certainly combine it with SAP Companion. I can't comment on WhatFix. I guess it depends on the technology, but broadly I'd say yes.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build - Currency fields
entry.content: The binding requires an additional formula build SAP - We get this error when use the formula mentioned above do you have guidance for the same ? @beapasch

entry.title: Re: A script attempting to access SAP GUI
entry.content: Go into the SAPGui settings, and under Scripts > Notifications, deselect the two options for "Notify me when...".

entry.title: Re: SAP ENABLE NOW - FREE TRIAL
entry.content: There is no free trial of SAP Enable Now available from SAP, but you can get pretty cheap access here (you get a single SAP Enable Now license and your own Workspace to play in).

entry.title: Would it be possible for you to help me with the following question:- the Baltimore Root
entry.content:
Good afternoon,
Would it be possible for you to help me with the following question:
- the Baltimore CyberTrust Root Certificate that I have in the Integration Suite will expire, but according to SAP note 3565626 it will no longer be renewed.
How then to proceed in the case of the Integration Suite?
If I already have DigiCert Global Root CA and DigiCert Global Root G2 Certificates, do I need to take any extra action?
I would appreciate a certain urgency
Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - How to detect navigation and read ro...
entry.content: I made the mistake of reading the component using getOwnerComponent(). However, if you read the component within a controller using this.getAppComponent(), you can then access this.getAppComponent().getRouter() and intercept the necessary events there.

entry.title: Re: Would it be possible for you to help me with the following question:- the Baltimore Root
entry.content: Only if you have any scenarios which are relying on that specific root certificate as part of authentication, encryption, decryption, etc.

entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Financial Statement version 1099 is not available in our Customizing system. Screenshot from our Starter system:

Is it possbile to export it from Starter and import it to the Customizing?

entry.title: Subcontracting with Source Location in ePP/DS S/4
entry.content:
Dear experts,

in SAP APO it was possible to implement a special Subcontracting process where the subcontractor as a source location is maintained in the APO and Planned Orders will be created for the subcontractor. 

Extract from SAP Help https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_scm700_ehp02/7.0.2/en-US/6e/37c95360267614e10000000a174cb4/content.htm?no_cache=true:

"In planning with a source location, an in-house production order is generated for the supplier (source location) who acts as a subcontractor. The requirements and stocks of subcontracting components are MRP-relevant in the source location and can be planned individually for each vendor."

When I try to re-create this process in ePP/DS (S/4) I assign the subcontractor as a MRP area and convert the Production Version as a PDS via CIF including the Routing for in-house production. The in-house production should take place at the subcontractor location but we (our customer) wants to plan the capacities for the Subcontractor. That's why we need a Planned Order as Receipt element. 

After creating the PDS, I noticed that there aren't any activities only components assigned to the PDS. The PDS is a subcontracting PDS. So, we don't get any Planned Orders as the system cannot calculate the in- house production.

My question is if it is even possible to recreate this process in S/4 ePP/DS and if yes can we use the Badi CUSLNTRTO_ADDIN to create the necessary activities on subcontractor location level?

Thank you for your support!

SCM APO Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling (PP/DS)

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...
entry.content:
@JaisonPJ1 

Agree with @Soma5.

You don't need to configure authentication rule for SF scenario and onboarding users. Just simple don't configure rules and set "default Authenticating Identity Provider" to your corporate IDP. The section "Allow Identity Authentications users to Log On" you should already have the checkbox set and you'll see an URL. That URL is for IAS logon and bypasses the IDP config.

We have configured the ONB emails to use such link so the onboardees are redirected to IAS.

For the rest of the users the default will be the IDP and since no rules in place there will be no prompt for mail for them

Diego

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Google Chart Does Not Render Any More
entry.content:
Hi,

Our App uses the D3.js/Google chart module for rendering graphs, this worked fine for our app created in AppGyver. Has been exported/imported into SAP Build Apps and since then the graph rendering does not work anymore. Upgraded the DS3.js/Google chart module towards the latest 2.0.0 version but without success. Anyone encountered the same issue ?

Searched the WEB for a similar case, found one but no solution proposed.

Help would be welcome.

Many thanks,

Walter Verhoeven

entry.title: Re: LOOP AT table with a Reference Variable
entry.content:
num is not linked in any way to the first loop. You can even move the num statement out of the loop.

  • line 42 creates num, there is no change to num reference
  • line 34 creates connection, connection is overwritten in line 58.

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HA...
entry.content:
cds deploy --to hana --auto-undeploy : https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-hana#cds-deploy-hana

Maybe you can also cleaning the generated files before building the project using this documentation: "Delete generated files and directories of the previous build from the CAP Java project" => https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/java/assets/cds-maven-plugin-site/clean-mojo.html

In the mtar file you opened, did you see anything under the differents /resources paths ?

Another idea: try cloning the project and building/deploying it from another space...

Hope this helps you move forward with the issue

entry.title: Re: S4 call to F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST returning all values even when selecting just one.
entry.content:
Hello Sandra

Thank you for the information, very useful.

The situation we are seeing is something different, here is how we are calling the FM:

CALL FUNCTION 'F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST'
EXPORTING
* DDIC_STRUCTURE = ' '
retfield = 'BNAME' "c_BNAME
* PVALKEY = ' '
dynpprog = sy-repid
dynpnr = sy-dynnr
dynprofield = c_l1
value_org = c_s
multiple_choice = c_x
TABLES
value_tab = t_user
* FIELD_TAB =
return_tab = i_return_tab
* DYNPFLD_MAPPING =
EXCEPTIONS
parameter_error = 1
no_values_found = 2
OTHERS = 3
.
IF sy-subrc NE 0.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.

The problem comes after the options are shown and a single entry is selected. The return tab is bringing back all the entries displayed regardless on whether they were selected or not.

This is happening in the production environment but not in the test box.

 

Now in the test environment we are seeing the checkboxes but in the production environment we dont see them.

 

Thank you

Hello,

im facing the same issu but with transferring data to PS , i was able to successfully enter an employee's time in the timesheet, for each of WBS element; however, when trying to transfer the data to PS via CAT5. the system displays a message saying that there are no records to transfer.

Could you please advise on what might be causing this constraint?

entry.title: Re: Financial Statement version 1099 is not available in...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it is not possible to export a Financial Statement Version (FSV) such as 1099 from a Starter system and import it into a Customizing or Development system.

The situation is like this mainly because :

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has no transport mechanism for Financial Statement Versions.
  • FSVs are treated as master data/configuration objects that must be manually recreated.
  • The Export Software Collection and SAP Cloud ALM tools do not support FSVs as exportable content.
  • The Starter system is strictly read-only and meant only for reference.

Here’s a recommended approach :

To replicate FSV 1099 from Starter into your system, follow this process:

  1. Open the Starter system and launch the app "Manage Financial Statement Versions".
  2. Navigate to FSV 1099 and take screenshots or export to Excel manually (if available).
  3. In your Customizing system, go to the same app and manually recreate the structure:
    • Chart of accounts
    • Node hierarchy
    • Assignments (G/L accounts, texts, etc.)

I hope this will help solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements RAP Attachment (LOB) Upload Not Refres...

entry.title: Re: Why is there no SAP Cloud ALM TDD?

When a partner wants a TDD license, they should get enterprise support, and then they can provision SAP Cloud ALM from SAP for Me.

 https://www.sap.com/germany/about/trust-center/agreements/partner-edge/partner-agreements.html


Regards 

Paul

entry.title: Re: LOOP AT table with a Reference Variable
entry.content: Zeno_rummler I am really grateful about your comment. Could You please help me with the central party of the topic?. Read this please:Hi MBartsch71,thanks for your time, that is a good option, but as I ask, when the work area is the same as the variable reference that call te method get_attributes the result is the exactly the same, in other words when I use "INTO var" with "var->get..." , "INTO num" with "num->get..." Or "INTO connection" with "connection->get..." With all of them I recieve the same result as You SEE in the second loop of the image. I am trying to understand the logic of the loop. Why if i put as a variable "num" (work area) and variable reference num to call the method "get attribute" it give me as result the three flights connections store in var, in num and connection.

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP: When and Where to Use Cluster Mode vs Standalone
entry.content:
Redis on SAP BTP is a fast, in-memory data cache cloud service that s supports a variety of use cases—from caching and real-time analytics, session management, leader boards, gamification and and many others.

On SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), Redis becomes even more powerful when paired with scalable enterprise workloads. However, choosing the right deployment mode—Standalone or Cluster—is critical for performance, availability, and scalability.

In this post, we’ll explore the differences between Redis standalone and cluster mode on SAP BTP, and provide some examples of when to use each based on your workload needs.

Standalone vs Cluster Mode: key differences

Feature

Redis Standalone

Redis Cluster

Architecture

Single nodeMultiple nodes (sharded data)

Scalability

Vertical (scale-up) onlyHorizontal (scale-out)

High Availability

No built-in failoverAutomatic failover and replication

Data Partitioning

Not supportedSupported via hash slots

Use Case Complexity

SimpleAdvanced / distributed workloads

Latency

Lower for small workloadsSlightly higher due to network hops

Resilience

Risk of data loss if node failsDesigned for resilience and recovery

When to use Standalone Mode

Standalone configuration is ideal for simpler, lightweight, or non-critical workloads where low latency and easy deployment are priorities.

Use cases examples:

  • Session caching for low-traffic apps: a single SAP Fiori app using Redis to store user sessions for a few hundred users.
  • Development and Testing: quick setups without complex networking or cluster orchestration, proof-of-concepts or early development phases.
  • Feature toggles and fast config in-memory storage: small, frequently accessed key-value pairs that don’t require horizontal scaling.

When to use Cluster Mode

Cluster is best for enterprise-grade applications that demand high availability, fault tolerance, and scalability across distributed systems.

Use cases examples:

  • Real-time leaderboards and gamification: for AI-powered apps with heavy cache read/write operations from thousands of users, for example a consumer rewards app with dynamic scoring and achievements stored in Redis hash slots.
  • Large-scale session management: multi-tenant SaaS platforms needing to maintain session state for thousands of concurrent users, where cluster mode ensures that load is distributed and failure in one node won’t affect all sessions.
  • Dynamic rate limiting across regions: distributed microservices enforcing API limits per user across geographies, cluster mode can ensure global availability and scalability of limit counters.

Redis on SAP BTP: Configuration guidance

When provisioning Redis via SAP BTP’s managed services  the decision to use standalone or cluster mode should align with:

  • Workload type (transactional vs analytical)
  • SLAs and uptime expectations
  • Expected traffic volume
  • Data access patterns

To switch modes, you typically need to redeploy the service instance with available service plans and entitlements (standard or premium). Be aware that cluster mode is not supported for all service plans in all hyperscalers/regions, please check here for more details. 

Make also sure that your application is capable of handling Redis on SAP BTP failovers gracefully and is cluster-aware.

Final thoughts

Choosing between Redis standalone and cluster mode on SAP BTP is not just a technical decision—it’s a strategic one. Standalone Redis gives you simplicity and speed for smaller workloads. Cluster mode, on the other hand, enables resilient, distributed architectures ready for enterprise scale.

By understanding the trade-offs and matching them to your use cases, you can make Redis on SAP BTP a powerful enabler of scalable, real-time, AI-enhanced applications.

 

Thanks for reading!
For more insights from the product team on Redis on SAP BTP, don't miss to read:
  • Redis on SAP BTP - INDEX of official blog posts
Regards, 
Antonio

entry.title: Archiving DFKKIA DFKKZR
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

According to the SAP EarlyWatch alert report, we are informed of the excessive number of records in the DFKKZR and DFKKIA tables. I appreciate your support in recommending housekeeping, partitioning, or archiving options to mitigate or resolve this alert.

Best Regards!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Archiving DFKKIA DFKKZR
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

thank you for your message. The Archiving Object for the Table DFKKIA is "FI_MKKDOC".

For the table DFKKZR, the only option is to delete entries. For this you can use the transaction FPZD or the report RFKKPFND. The program deletes all outdated payment document information. The impact is that after deletion the corresponding payment form cannot be used/displayed anymore.

Please consult this with your implementation partner for the integration part. 

Best Regards,
Mike
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Tricentis XScan is failing to scan a page on Microsoft Edge
entry.content: Hello!
